title: Evidence records
description: Per-directory evidence.yaml shape per [evidence:DEC-002-evidence-record-schema] + [project-kit:COR-023] binding. Each record captures one external excerpt cited by [ev:<slug>] tokens in adopter prose. Companion per COR-018.

pkit_schema.description: Adopter-side binding declaration (per [project-kit:COR-023]). When present on an adopter `evidence.yaml`, takes precedence over `binds_to:` fallback. Bare form `<capability>:<schema>` — e.g. `evidence:evidence-record`.

binds_to.description: Per-schema fallback binding (per [project-kit:COR-023]). Present on the capability-side schema YAML so the resolver can match adopter files without an explicit `pkit_schema:` field. Also accepted on adopter files for forward compatibility, though it has no effect there.

records.description: Evidence records. Each item has `id:` first (kebab-case slug). Chronological capture order recommended (newest at bottom) per the `evidence-add` skill.

id.description: Kebab-case stable identifier; cited via `[ev:<id>]` in adopter prose.

source_url.description: URL or other reference to the source of the excerpt.

fetched_at.description: Date the excerpt was captured (YYYY-MM-DD or ISO 8601 timestamp).

excerpt.description: Verbatim text from the source that grounds the claim. Multi-line via YAML's `|` block scalar.

note.description: Optional free-form note about what the fact is about.

entry.description: One evidence record per excerpt, per [evidence:DEC-002-evidence-record-schema].
